# NorthSail

> NorthSail is a global subscription platform that creates and manages affordable
> websites and mini web apps for small businesses worldwide. It handles the
> technical side — custom domain, hosting, SSL, website updates, business-specific
> booking tools and maintenance — so business owners don't have to. Plans start
> around €5/month for a basic online presence and €15/month for a mini app with
> one business-specific core feature (reservations, appointments, bookings or
> quote requests).

## What NorthSail provides
- Custom domain, hosting and SSL (managed)
- Mobile-first, fast-loading, indexable website
- Technical maintenance and updates
- WhatsApp button and Google Maps
- One business-specific core feature from the Mini App plan upwards:
  table reservations, online appointments, direct booking requests,
  class schedules and signups, or structured quote requests

## Who it serves
Restaurants and cafes, hairdressers and barbers, hotels and local accommodation,
gyms and personal trainers, clinics and local services, and local trades such as
electricians, plumbers, cleaning, renovation, garden and pool companies.

## Plans (entry "from" prices, monthly subscription)
- Presence — from €5/month: simple website, custom domain, hosting, SSL, WhatsApp, Google Maps, maintenance.
- Mini App — from €15/month: website plus one core feature (reservations, appointments, bookings, quote requests, schedules).
- Mini App Plus — from €25/month: more pages, better panel, basic automations, one small monthly update.
- Business Local — from €39/month: more complete management, multiple pages, advanced flows, multiple users, basic reports.
- Pro Management — from €69/month: advanced workflows, external integrations, dashboards, permissions, priority support.

## Not included in entry-level plans
Online payments, deposits and external integrations (POS, PMS, channel managers,
Booking.com/Airbnb sync, dynamic pricing, invoicing, CRM) are extras or part of
higher plans, not the €15 Mini App plan.

## How to choose the minimum plan
- Only an online presence → Presence (€5/month).
- One core feature such as reservations, appointments or quote requests → Mini App (€15/month).
- More pages and automations → Mini App Plus (€25/month).
- Multiple users and higher volume → Business Local (€39/month).
- Payments, multiple staff, multiple locations or integrations → Pro Management (€69/month).
